method: Rendered the rebuilt 16-page proof with pdftoppm after qualifying false-positive control, permutation-null assumptions, and direction-estimation claims under the ideal model. Verified pdfinfo reports 16 letter pages and pdffonts reports no Type 3 fonts. Visually inspected the full-proof contact sheet plus the changed proof pages. The dense proof text and references were legible with no clipping, overlap, blank page, or alignment defects.
